name: @soa-harness/example-provider-adapter
description: Reference ProviderAdapter scaffold for @soa-harness/runner §16.3 dispatcher. Shows the shape adopters follow when wiring a real LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Bedrock, Azure, local llama.cpp server, ...). NOT intended to be used as-is in production — this is a copy-and-customize starting point.
